MODULE: cosmos.memory.decentralized_graph
FILE: cosmos/memory/decentralized_graph.py (141 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS DECENTRALIZED MEMORY GRAPH
=================================

A reimagined memory architecture that transcends centralized dict storage.
This implements local sharding and dynamic cache invalidation across the Swarm.

Features:
1. Node-Edge Graph Architecture
2. Local Sharding per Agent
3. Dy

CLASSES:
- MemoryEdge: A semantic relationship between two memory nodes.
- MemoryNode: A single fragment of memory in the decentralized graph.
  Methods: def get_metadata(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DecentralizedGraph: Local Shard of the Global Memory Graph.
Each agent instantiates this to hold the
  Methods: async def store_node(self, content: str, tags: List[str]=None) -> MemoryNode
  Methods: async def ingest_metadata_sync(self, sync_payloads: List[Dict[str, Any]])
  Methods: async def link_nodes(self, source_id: str, target_id: str, relationship: str, weight: float=1.0)
  Methods: async def query_local_graph(self, query_tags: List[str]) -> List[MemoryNode]
  Methods: def get_sync_payload(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
